metric_definition.pronoun_item: memory item text contains at least one pronoun from a fixed list
metric_definition.anchored_pronoun_item: pronoun item also contains a likely named entity anchor such as a capitalized proper name or ALL CAPS token
metric_definition.ambiguous_pronoun_item: pronoun item contains pronoun but no anchor entity in the same item
